nasb.text: You were blameless in your ways From the day you were created Until unrighteousness was found in you.

esv.text: You were blameless in your ways from the day you were created, till unrighteousness was found in you.

cnv.text: 從你被造的日子起， 你的行為都無可指摘， 直到在你中間有了罪孽為止。

ccb.text: 你从受造那天开始所行的纯全无过， 但后来在你那里查出不义。
